title: AI-Driven Workflow Recommendation Engine & Sentinel AI Governance Platform v2.4 Implementation Specification with Executive Five-Year (2026-2030) G-SIB AI Transformation Roadmap Evaluation
classification: Confidential / Restricted — Board, CEO, CFO, CRO, CCO, CISO, CDAO, CTO, Enterprise Architects, AI Platform Engineers, Model Risk, Internal Audit, External Regulators
audiences: C-Suite (CEO, CFO, CRO, CCO, CISO, CDAO, CTO)

directive.scope: Provide (a) implementation-grade specifications — services, data models, APIs and machine-readable OPA/Rego + YAML/JSON artifacts — for an AI-Driven Workflow Recommendation Engine (WRE) and the Sentinel AI Governance Platform v2.4; (b) a prioritized, dependency-aware 2026-2030 implementation plan and a G-SIB five-year transformation roadmap; and (c) an executive-level critical evaluation of that roadmap covering financial, risk, regulatory and workforce implications, suitable for board and regulator consumption.
outcomes: WRE in production recommending next-best governed workflows/actions with policy-checked, explainable suggestions by 2027
Sentinel v2.4 control planes (policy, audit, containment, lineage, explainability) operational across material AI by 2028
Machine-readable governance artifacts (OPA/Rego, YAML/JSON schemas) versioned and CI/CD-gated by 2027
Prioritized plan executed P0->P3 with quantified benefits and dependency-aware sequencing
Board-approved 5-year roadmap with explicit financial, risk, regulatory and workforce evaluation and decision gates
doNot: Do NOT surface a WRE recommendation that has not passed OPA policy + explainability checks
Do NOT promote any WRE model without SR 11-7 validation and drift monitoring configured
Do NOT operate Sentinel control planes without WORM audit + PQC signing enabled
Do NOT present the 5-year roadmap to the board without the critical evaluation and named decision gates
Do NOT proceed past a phase gate with an unmet P0/P1 dependency

priorities.P0: Foundational / blocking — must complete before dependent work (security, audit, policy plane)
priorities.P1: High — core capability with material benefit and near-term dependency
priorities.P2: Medium — scale and optimization once core is live
priorities.P3: Lower — enhancements, civilizational engagement, advanced research

modules.title: Workflow Recommendation Engine (WRE) — Architecture & Services
modules.purpose: Specify the deployable microservice architecture for an AI-Driven Workflow Recommendation Engine that proposes next-best governed actions/workflows with policy-checked, explainable recommendations.

sections.title: Recommendation Service (rec-api)
sections.description: Stateless gRPC/REST service serving ranked next-best-workflow recommendations; calls candidate generation + ranking + policy filter.

sections.title: Candidate Generation Service
sections.description: Retrieves candidate workflows via collaborative filtering + content-based retrieval over the workflow catalog and user/process context.

sections.title: Ranking Service
sections.description: Learning-to-rank model (gradient-boosted trees + sequence model) scoring candidates on acceptance likelihood and expected value.

sections.title: Policy & Explainability Filter
sections.description: Every recommendation passes OPA/Rego eligibility + governance policy and is annotated with rationale and feature attributions before surfacing.

sections.title: Feedback & Online Learning
sections.description: Captures accept/reject/override signals to a feedback topic feeding periodic retraining and bandit exploration.

sections.title: Feature Store Integration
sections.description: Online/offline feature store (low-latency online store + batch offline store) with point-in-time correctness.

sections.title: Serving & Scaling
sections.description: Kubernetes-hosted autoscaled serving with canary/shadow deployment and A/B experimentation via WorkflowAI Pro.

sections.title: Observability & SLOs
sections.description: Metrics, traces and logs with SLOs on latency, acceptance and policy pass-rate; drift and fairness dashboards.

modules.title: WRE Data Models & Schemas
modules.purpose: Define the canonical entity, event, feature and feedback data models for the WRE, all keyed by CRS-UUID lineage.

sections.title: Workflow Catalog Entity
sections.description: Authoritative catalog of governed workflows with metadata, eligibility constraints, risk tier and required approvals.

sections.title: User/Process Context Entity
sections.description: Context features (role, entitlements, process state, recent actions) used for personalization under least-privilege.

sections.title: Recommendation & Decision Event
sections.description: Event recording each recommendation set, scores, policy outcome, rationale and user action, emitted to Kafka + WORM.

sections.title: Feedback Event
sections.description: Accept/reject/override/outcome events linked to recommendation events for closed-loop learning.

sections.title: Feature Definitions
sections.description: Declarative feature specs (entity, source, transformation, freshness) registered in the feature store.

sections.title: Model Card & Registry Record
sections.description: Model metadata (purpose, data, metrics, validation, risk tier) bound to each served ranking model.

modules.title: Sentinel AI Governance Platform v2.4 — Services & Control Planes
modules.purpose: Specify the Sentinel v2.4 control-plane services that govern all AI (including the WRE) — policy, audit, containment, lineage, explainability and reporting.

sections.title: Policy Plane (policy-svc)
sections.description: Centralized OPA/Rego policy decision point evaluating admission, data, access and model-promotion decisions.

sections.title: Audit Plane (audit-svc)
sections.description: Kafka WORM audit bus with hash-chaining, PQC signing and retention/legal-hold management.

sections.title: Containment Plane (containment-svc)
sections.description: Kill-switch, emergency air-gap, master governance key quorum and graduated response controller.

sections.title: Lineage Plane (lineage-svc)
sections.description: End-to-end CRS-UUID lineage across data, features, prompts, models, decisions and attestations.

sections.title: Explainability Plane (xai-svc)
sections.description: Captures and serves decision rationale, attributions, counterfactuals and reason codes.

sections.title: Reporting Plane (report-svc)
sections.description: Assembles Annex IV / SR 11-7 / NIST RMF reports and the AI Safety Report Generator outputs from live evidence.

sections.title: Access Plane (access-svc)
sections.description: zk-SNARK-gated privileged access and least-privilege enforcement with deterministic replay rights for audit.

sections.title: Sidecar Enforcement
sections.description: Node.js/Python governance sidecars enforcing policy, lineage emission and PII redaction at the inference boundary for WRE and all models.

modules.title: Sentinel Data Models, OPA/Rego Artifacts & APIs
modules.purpose: Provide the machine-readable data models, OPA/Rego policy artifacts and the public API surface for the Sentinel platform.

sections.title: PolicyDecision Model
sections.description: Canonical decision record (subject, action, policy, result, obligations, WORM ref, PQC sig).

sections.title: ContainmentEvent Model
sections.description: Containment trigger/action record with quorum, CRP score and notification targets.

sections.title: LineageRecord Model
sections.description: Edges linking data/feature/model/decision nodes by CRS-UUID with timestamps.

sections.title: OPA/Rego Policy Pack
sections.description: Versioned Rego policies for WRE eligibility, model promotion, access and submission gates.

sections.title: YAML/JSON Governance Artifacts
sections.description: Machine-readable control catalog, crosswalk and KPI definitions for tooling ingestion.

sections.title: Public API Surface
sections.description: Stable REST/gRPC contracts for policy evaluation, lineage query, evidence retrieval and report generation.

modules.title: Prioritized, Dependency-Aware Implementation Plan
modules.purpose: Sequence the build into P0-P3 priorities with explicit dependencies so blocking foundations precede dependent capabilities.

sections.title: P0 — Foundations
sections.description: Security baseline, Kafka WORM audit, OPA policy plane, lineage, model registry and CI/CD governance gates.

sections.title: P1 — Core Capabilities
sections.description: WRE candidate/ranking/serving, Sentinel explainability + reporting, SR 11-7 validation workflow, drift monitoring.

sections.title: P2 — Scale & Optimize
sections.description: Feature store maturity, online learning, A/B experimentation, zk-SNARK access, PQC estate-wide.

sections.title: P3 — Enhancements & Research
sections.description: Advanced agentic workflows, containment-lab integration, civilizational engagement, research backlog.

sections.title: Dependency Management
sections.description: DAG of inter-workstream dependencies with critical-path tracking and phase gates.

modules.title: G-SIB Five-Year Roadmap (2026-2030)
modules.purpose: Lay out the phased transformation roadmap with milestones and decision gates for a global systemically important bank.

sections.title: 2026 — Establish
sections.description: Governance operating model, P0 foundations, first WRE pilot in a single business line, model inventory + tiering.

sections.title: 2027 — Build
sections.description: WRE production in 2-3 business lines, Sentinel control planes GA, ISO 42001 readiness, SR 11-7 estate coverage.

sections.title: 2028 — Assure
sections.description: Estate-wide governance, PQC + zk access, Annex IV on demand, continuous compliance engine GA, audit replay.

sections.title: 2029 — Scale
sections.description: Agentic workflows under governance, online learning, systemic-risk controls validated, civilizational engagement.

sections.title: 2030 — Optimize
sections.description: Benefit realization >=0.80, target indices met, programme transitions to steady-state operations.

sections.title: Decision Gates
sections.description: Named board decision gates between phases with go/no-go criteria tied to KPIs and risk posture.

modules.title: Executive Critical Evaluation (Financial / Risk / Regulatory / Workforce)
modules.purpose: Provide a board-grade critical evaluation of the five-year roadmap across the four executive dimensions, including risks, sensitivities and recommendations.

sections.title: Financial Evaluation
sections.description: Business case, TCO, ROI (>=2.2x risk-adjusted), payback (<=30 months), sensitivity to adoption and benefit-realization assumptions.

sections.title: Risk Evaluation
sections.description: Model risk, operational resilience, concentration/systemic risk, and execution risk; residual-risk after controls.

sections.title: Regulatory Evaluation
sections.description: Coverage of EU AI Act/Annex IV, SR 11-7, Basel, FCA Consumer Duty/SMCR, MAS/HKMA FEAT; supervisory expectations and gaps.

sections.title: Workforce Evaluation
sections.description: Role impact, reskilling (>=0.75 of impacted roles by 2029), talent pipeline, change management and culture.

sections.title: Critical Risks & Failure Modes
sections.description: Honest assessment of where the programme could fail (over-automation, weak validation, vendor lock-in, talent gaps) and mitigations.

sections.title: Board Recommendation
sections.description: Net recommendation with conditions, decision gates and the minimal viable scope to de-risk year one.

modules.title: Regulator-Ready Report Sections
modules.purpose: Provide structured <title>/<abstract>/<content> sections for technical and regulatory submissions about the WRE, Sentinel platform and the 5-year programme.

sections.title: Report Section Standard
sections.description: Standard structure (title, abstract, content) with provenance, versioning and citation discipline (see reportSections).

sections.title: Evidence Binding
sections.description: Each section binds to live evidence artifacts (validation reports, policy decisions, audit records).

wreServices.description: Candidate workflow generation via ANN + content retrieval
OPA eligibility + governance filter and rationale attachment
Online/offline feature store with point-in-time correctness
A/B and shadow experimentation via WorkflowAI Pro

sentinelServices.description: WORM audit bus with hash-chain + PQC
Kill-switch, EAV, MGK quorum, graduated response
Annex IV / SR 11-7 / RMF report assembly
Model registry + model cards + promotion gates

dataModels.fields: workflowId, name, riskTier, eligibility, requiredApprovals, version
userId, role, entitlements, processState, recentActions, ttl
recId, context, candidates, scores, policyResult, rationale, action, wormRef
name, entity, source, transform, freshnessSLA, owner
modelId, purpose, trainingData, metrics, validation, riskTier
decisionId, subject, action, policy, result, obligations, wormRef, pqcSig
system, tier, trigger, action, quorum, crpScore, notified

apiEndpoints.description: Return ranked, policy-checked, explained recommendations for a context
Submit accept/reject/override feedback for a recommendation
List eligible governed workflows for a context
Append a hash-chained, PQC-signed audit record (WORM)
Assemble an Annex IV / SR 11-7 / RMF report from live evidence
Promote a model (gated by validation + policy)

implPlanItems.item: Kafka WORM audit bus + hash-chain + PQC signing
OPA policy plane (policy-svc) + Rego pack + CI/CD gates
Feature store maturity + online learning + experiments
Agentic workflows under governance + containment integration

roadmapPhases.milestone: Operating model + P0 foundations + WRE pilot in one business line
WRE production in 2-3 lines; Sentinel control planes GA; ISO 42001 readiness
Estate-wide governance; PQC+zk; Annex IV on demand; continuous compliance GA
Governed agentic workflows; online learning; systemic-risk controls validated
Benefit realization >=0.80; target indices met; steady-state operations

evaluation.assessment: Risk-adjusted ROI >=2.2x with <=30-month payback is achievable IF acceptance and benefit-realization assumptions hold; highly sensitive to WRE adoption (each 10pt acceptance drop reduces NPV materially).
evaluation.mitigation: Stage-gated funding tied to realized benefits; conservative base case

evaluation.assessment: Net risk posture improves once P0 controls live; residual risks are model risk (mitigated by SR 11-7 + drift), concentration/systemic risk from correlated recommendations, and execution risk in a large programme.
evaluation.keyRisk: Correlated/herding behavior from WRE at scale
evaluation.mitigation: Diversity constraints + systemic circuit breakers + human override

evaluation.assessment: Programme aligns to EU AI Act/Annex IV, SR 11-7, Basel, FCA Consumer Duty/SMCR and MAS/HKMA FEAT; principal gap is early supervisory engagement and Annex IV completeness for high-risk uses.
evaluation.mitigation: Proactive regulator engagement plan + Annex IV generator from day one

evaluation.assessment: Material role impact across operations and middle office; reskilling >=0.75 of impacted roles by 2029 is feasible with funded change management, but culture and trust in recommendations are critical success factors.
evaluation.keyRisk: Talent gaps + change resistance + trust deficit
evaluation.mitigation: Funded reskilling, human-in-the-loop design, transparent explainability

evaluation.assessment: Dependency-aware P0->P3 sequencing reduces execution risk, but the critical path runs through P0 foundations; slippage there cascades.
evaluation.keyRisk: P0 foundation slippage on critical path
evaluation.mitigation: Protect P0 funding/staffing; independent phase-gate reviews

reportSections.title: Executive Summary — 5-Year G-SIB AI Transformation
reportSections.abstract: Board-level summary of the WRE + Sentinel programme, the 5-year roadmap, the business case and the net recommendation with conditions.
reportSections.content: Synthesizes financial (ROI>=2.2x, payback<=30mo), risk (improved net-of-controls), regulatory (aligned-with-gaps) and workforce (feasible-with-investment) findings into a conditional board recommendation with named decision gates G1-G5 and a minimal-viable year-one scope.

reportSections.title: Workflow Recommendation Engine — Technical Specification
reportSections.abstract: Service architecture, data models, APIs and SLOs for the AI-Driven Workflow Recommendation Engine.
reportSections.content: Documents rec-api, candidate generation, ranking, policy/explainability filter, feedback/online learning, feature store and serving; the canonical data models (catalog, context, recommendation/feedback events, features, model cards); and the public API surface with latency and policy-pass-rate SLOs.

reportSections.title: Sentinel AI Governance Platform v2.4 — Technical Specification
reportSections.abstract: Control-plane services, data models, OPA/Rego artifacts and APIs for the Sentinel platform.
reportSections.content: Specifies policy, audit (WORM+PQC), containment, lineage, explainability, reporting and access planes; the PolicyDecision/ContainmentEvent/LineageRecord models; the versioned Rego pack and machine-readable YAML/JSON governance artifacts; and the stable API contracts.

reportSections.title: Implementation Plan & Dependency Map
reportSections.abstract: Prioritized P0-P3 implementation plan with explicit dependencies and critical path.
reportSections.content: Presents the P0 foundations, P1 core capabilities, P2 scale/optimize and P3 enhancements, the dependency DAG, and the phase gates that govern progression, with quantified benefits per workstream.

reportSections.title: Critical Evaluation & Board Recommendation
reportSections.abstract: Independent critical evaluation across financial, risk, regulatory, workforce and execution dimensions.
reportSections.content: Provides an honest assessment of ratings, key risks and mitigations per dimension, the principal failure modes (over-automation, weak validation, correlated behavior, talent gaps, P0 slippage), and a conditional board recommendation with quarterly review.

yaml_artifacts:
# control-catalog.yaml (excerpt) — machine-readable governance artifact
controls:
  - id: WRE-POLICY-FILTER
    description: All recommendations pass OPA before surfacing
    kpi: WRE-PolicyPassRate
    target: 1.0
  - id: SEN-AUDIT-WORM
    description: WORM-anchored, PQC-signed audit
    kpi: Sentinel-AuditCompleteness
    target: 1.0
openapi_snippets:
paths:
  /wre/recommend:
    post:
      summary: Ranked, policy-checked, explained recommendations
      responses:
        '200': { description: RecommendationResponse }
  /policy/evaluate:
    post:
      summary: OPA policy decision (PDP)
      responses:
        '200': { description: PolicyDecision }
sql_skeletons:
-- point-in-time correct feature join (offline)
SELECT f.* FROM features f
JOIN labels l ON f.entity_id = l.entity_id
WHERE f.event_ts <= l.label_ts  -- no leakage
  AND f.event_ts > l.label_ts - INTERVAL '30 days';

riskControlMatrix.control: Drift monitors + retraining triggers + fairness dashboards

riskControlMatrix.risk: P0 foundation slippage on critical path
riskControlMatrix.control: Protected P0 funding + independent phase gates

dataFlows.flow: context -> rec-api -> candidate-gen -> ranking -> policy-filter(OPA)+xai -> response -> RecommendationEvent -> Kafka WORM
user action -> feedback-collector -> Kafka -> offline store -> trainer (retrain + bandit) -> model-registry -> promotion gate
any model decision -> sidecar (policy+PII+lineage) -> audit-svc (WORM+PQC) -> deterministic replay on auditor request
frontier signal -> CRP -> containment-svc -> kill/airgap + quorum + notification
regulator obligation -> report-svc (Annex IV/SR 11-7/RMF) -> evidence binding -> signed dossier

regulators.name: EU AI Office
regulators.scope: EU AI Act, Annex IV, GPAI

rollout90.task: P0: security baseline + Kafka WORM audit + OPA policy plane bootstrap
P0: model registry + lineage-svc; define WRE data models + feature specs
P1: WRE candidate-gen + ranking (offline eval) in pilot business line
P1: rec-api + policy-filter + xai-svc; shadow-serve recommendations
P1: SR 11-7 validation + drift monitoring; report-svc alpha; first feedback loop
G1 decision gate: pilot KPIs (acceptance, policy-pass, latency) + board readout

evidencePack: WRE model cards + SR 11-7 validation reports
Recommendation + feedback event samples with lineage

executiveSummary.headline: An implementation-grade specification for an AI-Driven Workflow Recommendation Engine and the Sentinel AI Governance Platform v2.4 — plus a board-grade critical evaluation of a five-year (2026-2030) G-SIB AI transformation roadmap across financial, risk, regulatory and workforce dimensions.
executiveSummary.scope: 8 modules; 8 WRE services + 8 Sentinel services; 9 data models; 12 APIs; 13 prioritized plan items (P0-P3); 5 roadmap phases with gates; 5-dimension critical evaluation.
executiveSummary.targetIndices: WRE-Acceptance>=0.55, WRE-Precision@3>=0.70, Policy-PassRate=1.0, Sentinel-AuditCompleteness=1.0, Replay-DRI>=0.95, ROI-5yr>=2.2x, Payback<=30mo, Workforce-Reskill>=0.75.
executiveSummary.recommendation: Conditional GO with stage-gated funding: protect P0 foundations on the critical path, tie funding to realized benefits, engage regulators early, and fund reskilling + human-in-the-loop to manage adoption and systemic-behavior risk.
differentiators: Concrete buildable services + data models + APIs (not just architecture)
Every recommendation is policy-checked and explainable before surfacing
Dependency-aware P0-P3 plan with named board decision gates
Honest critical evaluation incl. failure modes and correlated-behavior systemic risk
Machine-readable governance artifacts (OPA/Rego + YAML/JSON) wired to CI/CD
